message: Cached parsed HTTP grant options per CapabilityGrant instance, reusing allowed host/scheme sets and scalar flags across repeated requests; added repeated in-memory HTTP GET allocation benchmark.

Verified SafeHttpGrantReader caches parsed SafeHttpGrantOptions per CapabilityGrant with ConditionalWeakTable; SafeHttpClient continues enforcing explicit allowedHosts/allowedSchemes, request/response byte limits, timeout, IP literal, and private-network gates from cached options. Benchmark HttpGrantParsingBenchmarks builds. Focused SafeNetwork/Network quota/IP tests passed: 47/47. Benchmark Release build passed with 0 warnings/errors. CodeEnforcer passed. agentq doctor ok.
